nasb.text: Behold, all souls are Mine; the soul of the father as well as the soul of the son is Mine. The soul who sins will die.

esv.text: Behold, all souls are mine; the soul of the father as well as the soul of the son is mine: the soul who sins shall die.

cnv.text: 看哪！所有的人都是屬我的，作父親的怎樣屬我，作兒子的也怎樣屬我，唯獨犯罪的，才會滅亡。

ccb.text: 因为所有的生命都属于我，父和子都属于我。谁犯罪，谁死亡。
